toggles.mute_notifications_hint: You won't receive match or message pushes.
toggles.hide_distance_hint: Other users won't see your distance on the card.
toggles.show_age_hint: Show your age on the Discover card.
toggles.allow_analytics_hint: Usage events (no name, photo, or chat content). Turn off any time.
toggles.restrict_reactions_hint: Only your matches can send you reactions in events. Off = any attendee.
